name: SponsorBlock
description: Skip sponsored segments in YouTube videos using SponsorBlock data.

versions.changelog: Fix segments not reaching clients. v1.1.0.0 dropped the IMediaSegmentProvider registration to avoid the slow scan, but Jellyfin filters segments by registered provider, so stored segments were never served. Re-register a stub provider (Supports => false, GetMediaSegments => empty) so Jellyfin recognizes 'SponsorBlock' as a known provider while the orchestrator stays in charge of fetching.

Add admin Reset button on the plugin config page that wipes SponsorBlock state and owned segments for items in the configured library scope, so the orchestrator re-fetches on next playback. Useful for re-fetching items whose SponsorBlock data became available after the initial scan.

Replace media-segment scan with event-driven orchestrator. Add daily refresh task at configurable hour. Add per-library scoping (empty by default — admin must opt in). SQLite per-item state machine (Pending/HasData/NoData) with 48h sanity check.
Remove non-functional user segment actions table from config page.
